description_long: This guard rail consists of four parallel horizontal bars, evenly spaced and supported by two vertical posts at each end. The structure is constructed from what appears to be black-coated metal, likely steel, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The ends of the horizontal rails are capped and attached to the posts with visible fasteners, ensuring stability and rigidity. The overall design is minimalistic, with no decorative elements, focusing purely on function and safety. The railings are straight and the posts extend slightly above the top rail, possibly for additional mounting or safety purposes. There are no visible reflective markings or end treatments beyond the blunt, capped ends.
description: A sturdy, black metal guard rail with four horizontal bars and two vertical posts, designed for safety and separation in urban environments. The structure is simple, functional, and industrial in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four horizontal rails and both vertical posts, with clear visibility of the rail spacing and attachment points.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the edge of the posts and rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the four horizontal rails and two vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile with minimal visible detail except the post and rail edges.
